segment.source: Renders a footer that pairs a heading and rich-text intro with an embedded newsletter signup form (TYPO3 Form Framework), an optional privacy note beneath the form, and a copyright line. Use it for: subscribe prompts, mailing-list invitations, and stay-updated sections that close a page. Prefer 'Newsletter Signup' or 'Newsletter Inline' for mid-page capture; 'Mega Footer' when link columns must accompany the form.
